headline: Texas Pacific (TPL) Soars 8.5%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Texas Pacific (TPL) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
